name: SaaS Revenue Calculator
description: Estimate monthly recurring revenue and growth.

example.explanation: Annual recurring revenue is monthly revenue times 12.

faqs.question: What is ARPU?
faqs.answer: Average Revenue Per User indicates revenue generated per customer.

faqs.question: Is churn included?
faqs.answer: This is a snapshot; churn reduces customers over time.

faqs.question: Why is ARR important?
faqs.answer: ARR helps investors and stakeholders understand the value and growth potential of the business.
